name: oh-my-gemini
description: Hook-enforced workflows for Gemini CLI. Install it, and your AI coding workflow instantly levels up.
author: richardcb

SessionStart.name: omg-session-start
SessionStart.description: Load Conductor state and project context on startup; concise output on resume

BeforeAgent.name: omg-context-injection
BeforeAgent.description: Dynamic context injection based on task type

BeforeTool.name: omg-security-gate
BeforeTool.description: User-custom command/path blocks and git checkpoints before file/shell operations

BeforeToolSelection.name: omg-tool-filter
BeforeToolSelection.description: Dynamic tool filtering based on detected agent mode (researcher/architect/executor)

AfterAgent.name: omg-ralph-retry
AfterAgent.description: Persistence mode (Ralph) - automatic retry on failure with circuit breaker awareness

omg-memory.description: Conductor memory tools (search, timeline, get, drift, status)

phaseGates.strict.description: [Deprecated] Phase gates are now advisory-only. This setting is ignored.

security.gitCheckpoints.description: Create git checkpoints before file modifications

toolFilter.enabled.description: Filter tools based on detected agent mode

ralph.enabled.description: Enable persistence mode (ralph) for automatic retry

ralph.stuckThreshold.description: Consecutive same-error retries before stuck protocol fires

ralph.suggestedSkill.description: Skill to suggest when Ralph keywords detected

planMode.enabled.description: Enable plan mode integration (read-only tool restrictions via omg-plan-mode.toml)

modes.enabled.description: Enable the mode system (research, implement, review, quickfix, plan, eco)

modes.default.description: Default primary mode when no keyword is detected

memory.enabled.description: Enable Conductor memory observation writes and retrieval

memory.maxObservationsPerTrack.description: Maximum observations to retain per track before pruning

memory.autoStart.description: Auto-start omg-memory MCP server at session start
